scenes.headline: RM300/month for 30 years
scenes.body: Same RM300 a month. Compounded at 8% annually for 30 years. Final value: roughly RM580,000. The math is the magic.

thumbnailBrief: Celebratory growth tone. Hero number 'RM580,000' as the focal point — large, bold, in orange. Navy background. Sub-line below in lighter weight explaining the compounding mechanic. Logo bottom-right per brand contract.
